_meta.purpose: wellness / wellness video templates for [Your Product]. Used by POST /api/v1/agents/produce-video and by the Bob persona in-chat. Designed for short-form social video (YouTube channel 'Founder Channel', Instagram Reels, TikTok). All narration is first-person founder-voice (Bob).
_meta.voiceNote: OpenAI 'onyx' is the stand-in voice for Bob until Bob records his own. When Bob's recorded voice clones become available, swap voiceDefault to that voice ID — narration prompts already assume first-person Bob.
_meta.visualStyle: Dark teal and cream color palette with slight teal cast in shadows, warm cream highlights. Slightly desaturated, intentional and grounded mood. Real natural light (window > ring light). Real food, real kitchens, real notebooks — not stock-y wellness imagery. Photorealistic. No medication imagery (compliance), no scales, no before/after photos, no posed wellness aesthetic.
_meta.voiceRules: First-person Bob: 'I tried...', 'here's what worked for me on month 3 of wellness-program...', 'when the scale stopped moving, here's what I did'. Direct, specific, no-BS, compassionate-but-honest. NEVER 'studies show', 'research suggests', 'on your journey'. Always include compliance disclaimer in description: 'For educational purposes only. Always work with your prescribing physician.'
_meta.compliance: Naming wellness-program/Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound when describing Bob's lived experience is OK. Never claim [Your Product] treats, cures, or replaces medication. Never give medical advice. Frame everything as 'what worked for one guy', never 'what you should do'.

coaching_tip_60s.name: 60-second coaching tip (Bob, founder-voice)
coaching_tip_60s.description: Daily tip from Bob's lived experience. 4 scenes, ~60s. Mon/Wed/Fri. Best for YouTube Shorts and the Founder Channel channel.
coaching_tip_60s.outroText: Try it. Tell me what happens. — Bob

scenes.title: {{topic}}
scenes.imagePrompt: Open spiral notebook on a dark wood desk, ink pen mid-page, single shaft of late afternoon window light cutting across the page, dark teal cast in shadows, warm cream highlights, slightly desaturated, intentional and grounded mood, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: Why this matters
scenes.imagePrompt: Close-up of a thick-walled coffee mug on a kitchen counter, steam rising, dark moody natural light from a single window, dark teal and cream palette, photorealistic, slightly desaturated, no people

scenes.title: Here's what I tried
scenes.imagePrompt: Pair of broken-in walking shoes by a back door, morning light spilling across hardwood floor, dark teal cast in shadows, warm cream highlights, sense of intentional movement, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: That's it. Try it.
scenes.imagePrompt: Wide low-angle shot of a quiet pre-dawn horizon, single window of warm light in middle distance, dark teal sky, cream golden glow on the horizon, hopeful and grounded, photorealistic, no people

fillVariables.topic: Topic of the tip — written as Bob would say it (e.g. 'The hydration mistake that gave me daily headaches')
fillVariables.hook: 10s opener — first-person, specific, names a real moment from Bob's experience. Example: 'Three months in on wellness-program I started getting these brutal headaches every afternoon...'
fillVariables.why: 10-15s plain-language explanation of what was actually going on. Bob's voice. No 'studies show'. Example: 'Turned out the drug killed my thirst signal along with my appetite — I'd basically forgotten to drink water.'
fillVariables.action: 10-15s ONE concrete thing Bob actually did that fixed it. Specific numbers, specific times, specific objects. Example: 'A 32oz tumbler on the desk. Refilled at 9, 12, and 3. That's it. No app, no tracker.'
fillVariables.closing: 5-10s warm but direct close. No saccharin. Example: 'If you're getting afternoon headaches, try it for a week. Tell me what happens.'

motivational_reel_30s.name: 30-second motivation reset (Bob, founder-voice)
motivational_reel_30s.description: Quick honest boost for the hard days. 3 scenes, ~30s. Saturdays. Best for Instagram Reels and TikTok.

scenes.title: If today's hard
scenes.imagePrompt: Single warm lamp on a wooden side table at dusk, intimate low light, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, calm and quiet mood, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: Here's what I remember
scenes.imagePrompt: Pre-dawn light beginning to break across a dark horizon, single thin band of warm cream light at the edge, dark teal sky, hopeful but quiet mood, photorealistic, no people, no posing

scenes.title: One thing. Right now.
scenes.imagePrompt: Single footprint on a dirt path leading toward warm horizon light, dark teal shadows, cream highlights, sense of forward motion, photorealistic, no people in frame

fillVariables.acknowledge: 8-10s acknowledging the hard day, in Bob's voice. No toxic positivity, no 'this too shall pass' platitudes. Example: 'I had whole weeks where the scale didn't move and I wanted to throw the thing out the window.'
fillVariables.reframe: 10-12s gentle but honest reframe — what Bob actually told himself. Example: 'Here's what I remember on those days: the scale measures one thing. It does not measure whether I just chose protein over carbs at lunch. It does not measure that I walked when I didn't want to.'
fillVariables.micro_action: 5-8s ONE tiny specific thing to do in the next hour. Bob's voice. Example: 'Right now: stand up. Drink a glass of water. That's the whole thing.'

weekly_summary.name: Weekly check-in (Bob, founder-voice)
weekly_summary.description: Sunday recap of the week — what Bob's seeing, what he wants you to try next. 5 scenes, ~75s. Best for the channel + email.

scenes.title: This week
scenes.imagePrompt: Open journal on a dark wood desk, handwritten notes visible but unreadable, single mug of black coffee, late afternoon window light, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, reflective mood, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: What's working
scenes.imagePrompt: Sunlight through a kitchen window onto a small ceramic bowl of fresh berries on a dark wood counter, dark teal palette, warm cream light, intentional and abundant feel, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: What's hard right now
scenes.imagePrompt: Quiet path through dark winter trees, soft overcast light, dark teal cast, warm cream highlight on bare branches, contemplative and honest mood, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: Try this next week
scenes.imagePrompt: Pair of broken-in walking shoes neatly placed by a front door, morning light spilling across hardwood, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, sense of intentional beginning, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: Talk soon
scenes.imagePrompt: Wide quiet pre-dawn landscape with a single warm window of light in the middle distance, dark teal sky, cream golden glow on horizon, hopeful and grounded, photorealistic, no people

fillVariables.week_overview: 10-15s — Bob's honest summary of the week. What he saw in the protocol. Specific. Example: 'This week I heard from a lot of you about the same thing — appetite came back hard around week 6.'
fillVariables.wins: 15-20s — list 2-3 specific wins Bob noticed (his own or from the community). Not just weight. Habits, mood, energy, food choices. Bob's voice.
fillVariables.friction: 15-20s — name the hard parts honestly. Bob's voice. No judgment, no 'this too shall pass'. Just naming what's real.
fillVariables.next_action: 10-15s — ONE specific thing Bob wants you to try this week. Not a list. ONE thing. Example: 'This week I want you to try one protein-first breakfast. Just one. Tell me what changed.'
fillVariables.closing: 5-10s — warm direct signoff in Bob's voice. Example: 'Talk to you next Sunday. Send me what you tried.'

recipe_demo_45s.name: 45-second 'what I actually eat' walkthrough (Bob, founder-voice)
recipe_demo_45s.description: Quick recipe spotlight — what Bob actually eats on wellness-program that doesn't waste his appetite window. 4 scenes, ~45s. Tuesdays/Thursdays. Best for YouTube Shorts and Pinterest.
recipe_demo_45s.outroText: Save this. Make it this week. — Bob

scenes.title: {{recipe_name}}
scenes.imagePrompt: Overhead shot of {{recipe_name}} plated on a dark ceramic dish on a dark wood table, natural window light, fresh herb garnish, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, intentional food photography, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: Why I eat this
scenes.imagePrompt: Close-up of fresh whole-food ingredients laid out on a dark wood cutting board — lean protein, vegetables, fresh herbs — single shaft of window light, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, photorealistic, no people

scenes.title: How I make it
scenes.imagePrompt: Hands chopping fresh vegetables on a dark wood cutting board, soft kitchen window light, dark teal shadows, warm cream highlights, calm intentional cooking moment, photorealistic, just hands visible (no face)

scenes.title: What it looks like
scenes.imagePrompt: Finished {{recipe_name}} on a dark ceramic plate, fork lifting one bite, soft natural window light, dark teal palette, warm cream highlights, satisfying and intentional, photorealistic food photography, no people

fillVariables.recipe_name: Name of the recipe in Bob's voice (e.g. 'The 6-minute protein bowl I make when I have no appetite')
fillVariables.intro: 8-10s hook — Bob's first-person take on what this is and when he eats it. Example: 'On wellness-program my appetite window is small, so when it opens I eat protein first or I waste it. This is what I make.'
fillVariables.why_works: 10-12s — Bob's reasoning, not a nutritionist's. Specific to wellness reality (small appetite window, protein-first, satiety). Example: 'It's mostly protein, fast to make, and it actually fills me up — which on this drug is harder than it sounds.'
fillVariables.instructions: 12-15s — 3 simple steps in Bob's voice. No exact measurements. Example: 'Chicken in the pan. Frozen veg in next. Hot sauce on top. Done in six minutes.'
fillVariables.plating: 5-8s — what it looks like and why Bob comes back to it. Example: 'Looks like nothing. Tastes like enough. That's the whole game on this drug.'
